When this creature enters, create a 0/1 white Goat creature token.

Flying

cards.name: Moldervine Reclamation
cards.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control dies, you gain 1 life and draw a card.

cards.name: Guardian Project
cards.oracle_text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, if it doesn't have the same name as another creature you control or a creature card in your graveyard, draw a card.

cards.name: Reanimate
cards.oracle_text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. You lose life equal to that card's mana value.

cards.name: Dread Return
cards.oracle_text:
Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
Flashback—Sacrifice three creatures. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

cards.name: Persist
cards.oracle_text: Return target nonlegendary creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a -1/-1 counter on it.

cards.name: Victimize
cards.oracle_text: Choose two target creature cards in your graveyard. Sacrifice a creature. If you do, return the chosen cards to the battlefield tapped.

cards.name: Nethergoyf
cards.oracle_text:
Nethergoyf's power is equal to the number of card types among cards in your graveyard and its toughness is equal to that number plus 1.
Escape—{2}{B}, Exile any number of other cards from your graveyard with four or more card types among them. (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its escape cost.)
